findings.description: Duplicated closing block content: 'Sincerely,' the signer's name, and title appear twice — once embedded in the signature image and again as separate text below it.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 shows a single 'Sincerely,' followed by the handwritten signature, then 'Judith A. Wehner / Assistant State Mining Specialist'. The HTML renders 'Sincerely,' as text, then displays a signature image that itself contains 'Sincerely,' and 'Judith A. Wehner / Assistant State Mining S…', then repeats 'Judith A. Wehner' and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist' as separate text lines. A reader encounters the closing salutation and name/title twice.
